name: Choco Peanut Butter Dreams
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat together brown sugar, peanut butter, and margarine until light and fluffy.
3. Blend in water, egg, and vanilla extract.
4. Add the combined dry ingredients (oats, flour, baking soda) and mix well until just incorporated.
5. Shape dough into 1/4-inch thick balls.
6. Place the dough balls on an ungreased cookie sheet, flattening them to about 1/4 inch thickness with the bottom of a glass dipped in sugar.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until edges are golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
9. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate chips and shortening; stir until smooth.
10. Drizzle half of the melted chocolate over each cooled cookie, then sprinkle with chopped nuts.
11. Allow to set before storing in an airtight container.
